title: TSEG's Simple Clouds Datapack
description: Adds many new cloud variants to nonamecrackers2's Simple Clouds Mod
body:
# TSEG's Simple Clouds is a datapack for the mod [Simple Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-clouds).

**This datapack adds 34 new cloud types! With a grand total of 42!**



## Cloud Types:

### Some cloud images will be located in the Gallery!

- Ball like Clouds
  
- Cumulus Noise Clouds
  
- Dark Wall Cloud
  
- Dense Cumulus Clouds
  
- Dense Itty Bitty Clouds
  
- Dense Stratocumulus Clouds
  
- Dense Tsegrus Clouds
  
- Dense Stratus Clouds
  
- Island Clouds
  
- Slightly Larger Itty Bitty Clouds
  
- Noisy Itty Bitty Clouds
  
- Overcast Clouds
  
- Pathway like Clouds
  
- Real Itty Bitty Clouds
  
- Severe Cumulonimbus Storm Clouds
  
- Severe Stratocumulus Storm Clouds
  
- Spotted/Spot Clouds
  
- Stripe like Clouds
  
- Stronger Stratus Storm Clouds
  
- Sugar/Salt looking Clouds
  
- Tall Noise like Clouds
  
- Tsegrus Clouds

And More!
